message:
fix(runtime): return per-client subscription counts and fix premature store unsubscribe

Change pubsub_sub_count() and pubsub_shard_sub_count() to accept
client_id and return that client's subscription count instead of
the global total, matching Redis SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE reply semantics.

Fix premature store.unsubscribe/punsubscribe/sunsubscribe calls —
only notify the store when the last subscriber for a channel/pattern
is removed (check pubsub_*_subs map emptiness before calling store).
Previously, unsubscribing any single client would tell the store
the channel had no subscribers, breaking keyspace notifications for
remaining subscribers.

Also call store.unsubscribe/punsubscribe/sunsubscribe in
disconnect_client cleanup when the last subscriber set becomes empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
